summary: Theme toggle feature (sun/moon icons) comprehensively tested and verified working. All 10 requested features passed: theme toggle switches between light/dark themes, light theme has white/light backgrounds (#F5F7FA), dark theme has dark navy backgrounds (#0A1628) with background image overlay, all sections render correctly in both themes, language toggle works alongside theme toggle, all modals properly themed, source/KPI/output cards render correctly, buttons use CSS variable colors, Quick Chat section visible in both themes.
passed_tests: 1. Theme toggle button (sun/moon icon) found at data-testid='theme-toggle-btn' - PASS
2. Initial state: light theme (data-theme='light'), moon icon showing - PASS
3. Click toggle: switches to dark theme (data-theme='dark'), sun icon showing - PASS
4. Light theme CSS: --bg-main=#F5F7FA, --bg-card=white, --text-primary=#1A1F36 - PASS
5. Light theme: --primary=#006C5B (Saudi Green), --accent=#C8A86B (Gold) - PASS
6. Dark theme CSS: --bg-main=#0A1628, --bg-card=rgba(255,255,255,0.04), --text-primary=#f8fafc - PASS
7. Dark theme: background image overlay (Riyadh cityscape) visible - PASS
8. Nav tabs themed correctly in dark mode (gold accent color rgb(200, 168, 107)) - PASS
9. All sections (Overview, Chat, Sources, Studio, Notes) render in dark theme - PASS
10. All sections (Overview, Chat, Sources, Studio, Notes) render in light theme - PASS
11. Upload modal themed correctly in both light and dark modes - PASS
12. Share modal themed correctly in dark mode - PASS
13. Settings modal themed correctly in dark mode - PASS
14. Profile modal themed correctly in dark mode - PASS
15. Language toggle (EN/AR) works alongside theme toggle - theme preserved - PASS
16. RTL layout (dir='rtl') works with both themes - PASS
17. Source cards render correctly in both themes - PASS
18. KPI cards (Total Sources, Indexed Chunks, Studio Outputs, AI Queries) styled correctly - PASS
19. Output cards in Studio view render correctly in both themes - PASS
20. Quick Chat section visible with input and 3 quick prompt buttons - PASS
21. New button uses --primary (#006C5B) as background color - PASS
22. Share button uses CSS variable colors for background and border - PASS
23. Theme toggle switches back to light from dark correctly - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CSS variables properly defined for both [data-theme='light'] and [data-theme='dark'] at lines 1573-1624
Theme toggle button correctly uses isDark state from ThemeContext to conditionally render sun/moon icons
Background overlay images only render when isDark is true (lines 1566-1570)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle feature fully implemented and tested. Sun/moon icons in nav bar switch between light Saudi Vision theme (white backgrounds #F5F7FA, green #006C5B accents) and dark Saudi Healthcare Command theme (dark navy #0A1628 with Riyadh cityscape overlay, gold #C8A86B accents). All CSS hardcoded colors replaced with CSS custom properties. Language toggle (EN/AR) with RTL support works independently from theme toggle.
